Why Paw Delight

Four reasons dogs never want anything else.

01

Nutrient Retention

Low heat locks in vitamins, amino acids, and enzymes that high-heat baking destroys.

02

Naturally Preserved

Moisture removal prevents bacterial growth — zero chemical preservatives needed.

03

Dental Health

Natural chewing on dehydrated meat mechanically reduces plaque and tartar.

04

Single Ingredient

Every product contains one thing: real, human-grade meat. No mystery words.

Clean Label Promise

What's Inside

An ingredient list
two words long.

We put exactly what's in the bag — on the bag. Our entire ingredient list is: 100% real meat.

  • 100% Real Meat— the only ingredient, every time
  • No Artificial Preservatives— shelf-stable by dehydration alone
  • No Colors or Artificial Flavors— the real taste speaks for itself
  • No Fillers or By-products— every gram is pure protein
  • Human-Grade Processing— food-safe certified facility
Browse All Products →

The Science

Why dehydrated beats every other process.

01

Single-source, human-grade meat

Each product starts with one traceable, human-grade meat. Selected for quality before any processing begins.

02

Low heat dehydration under 70°C

We dry slowly below the temperature where nutrients degrade. Most baked treats hit 180°C+ — destroying the benefits on their label.

03

Nutrients locked, moisture removed

Removing moisture concentrates protein and flavour naturally. Nothing added — nothing wasted.

04

Naturally shelf-stable, no chemicals

Bacteria need moisture to grow. Our dehydration eliminates that — no preservatives, no compromise.

🌡️

Low Heat.
High Integrity.

Most commercial pet treats hit 180°C+ — destroying heat-sensitive vitamins and amino acids. We stay under 70°C, where all the good stuff survives intact.

Vet Approved
Human-Grade
No GMO
Single Ingredient
All Breeds

Care Guide

Getting the most from every treat.

Simple storage, simple feeding — just the way it should be.

🏠
Before Opening

Cool, dry place — no fridge needed

Store away from sunlight. Dehydration keeps it shelf-stable until the seal is broken.

📦
After Opening

Reseal tight · consume within 3 days

Reseal the original pouch or use an airtight container. Refrigerate for best quality.

🐾
Feeding

All breeds · from 3 months old

Suitable for all breeds and sizes. Break into smaller pieces for puppies or toy breeds.
